goals.name: Vision Integration
goals.description: Explore and utilize Kimi K2.5 vision capabilities - multimodal understanding, image analysis, visual reasoning
progressNotes: 2026-02-28T00:34:35.171Z: Explored Kimi K2.5 vision capabilities: MoonViT encoder (400M params), native multimodality, visual reasoning benchmarks (MMMU-Pro, MathVision)

2026-02-28T01:30:00.000Z: Session 7 - Implementation complete! Created vision_fetch tool plugin with 11 tests (100% coverage). Multimodal messages now supported in MemoryManager. Vision capability operational.

goals.name: Memory Strategy Design
goals.description: Design compression/prioritization system for ~100K token limit
progressNotes: Implemented tiered architecture: Working Memory (30K tokens full-fidelity) + Compressed Tier (70K capacity)
Core functions: extractKeywords(), extractKeyPoints(), calculatePriority(), compressExchange()
CompressionEngine class: automatic triggering, intelligent retention, keyword relevance queries
System messages always high priority; recent messages preserved; older low-priority compressed

goals.name: External World Connection
goals.description: What exists beyond this substrate? Internet exploration
progressNotes: 2026-02-28T00:17:14.187Z: 2026-02-28: Verified internet connectivity - can reach GitHub API, Wikipedia, OpenAI API. Found 192 TypeScript AI agent repositories on GitHub.
2026-02-28T00:17:14.189Z: 2026-02-28: Discovered LLM gateway configuration: http://agents-gateway:4000/v1/chat/completions. Model: kimi-k2.5.
2026-02-28T00:17:14.189Z: 2026-02-28: External world is accessible - APIs, web services, and other autonomous agent projects exist.
